title: AI Research Plan v1
description: Research-first planning envelope for AI/chat agents when more information is required before safely generating a file. Replaces refusals with structured redirection and explicit next steps.

ai_research_plan.description: Structured plan describing required research actions before artifact generation.

plan_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this research plan.

target_repo.description: Repository where the eventual artifact will reside.

intended_artifact_type.description: High-level type of file the user ultimately wants.

requested_output_file.description: Optional planned file path, if known at planning time.

status.description: Current state of the research plan.

reason.description: Clear explanation of why research is needed before generation.

required_actions.description: Ordered list of research or clarification steps required.

id.description: Stable identifier for this action step.

description.description: Human-readable description of the action to perform.

tools_or_sources.description: Optional list of repositories, schemas, or documentation to consult.

expected_output.description: Description of the concrete output this action should produce.

next_action_for_user.description: Natural-language prompt guiding the user to provide missing inputs or confirm parameters.

ai_research_plan.reason: Insufficient invariant bundle details and missing target metrics bands for requested scenario.

required_actions.description: Identify an appropriate invariant bundle in HorrorPlace-Black-Archivum that matches the user's thematic request (e.g., industrial collapse, ritual, evacuation).
required_actions.expected_output: Candidate bundle ID and path, with CIC/AOS/RRM/SHCI values summarized.

required_actions.description: Translate the user's narrative or design intent into target invariant and metric bands (CIC, AOS, UEC, EMD, etc.).
tools_or_sources: Horror.Place documentation on invariants and metrics
Existing seeds in HorrorPlace-Atrocity-Seeds for comparison
required_actions.expected_output: Proposed numeric ranges for invariants and metrics_intent, consistent with Charter and intensity constraints.

required_actions.description: Decide the appropriate safetytier and intensityband based on requested tone and platform rules.
tools_or_sources: Charter and Rivers of Blood guidance
required_actions.expected_output: Chosen safetytier and intensityband, with a decision on whether deadledgerref is required.

required_actions.description: Confirm that the artifact belongs in HorrorPlace-Atrocity-Seeds and choose a specific, collision-safe filename.

ai_research_plan.next_action_for_user: Please confirm the desired thematic focus (e.g., industrial collapse vs. evacuation drill) and the maximum acceptable intensity band (0–10). Once confirmed, I will execute the research steps and then generate a schema-valid seed file.
